top_signals.title: Bilbao, Amsterdam, Milan: Where should Champions Cup rugby go next?
top_signals.summary: The best thing about the Investec Champions Cup and EPCR Challenge Cup finals weekend is its location: Bilbao. It is not the first time the two premier continental fixtures have ventured to El Botxo – the San Mames Stadium hosted Leinster’s victory over Racing 92 in 2018 and Cardiff’s Challenge Cup win over Gloucester a [...]

top_signals.title: Japan says it will crack down harder on illegal overstaying
top_signals.summary: The stronger crackdown measures come as the number of foreign nationals staying illegally fell to 68,488 as of Jan. 1, down from about 74,863 a year earlier.

alerts.title: Japan says it will crack down harder on illegal overstaying
alerts.summary: The stronger crackdown measures come as the number of foreign nationals staying illegally fell to 68,488 as of Jan. 1, down from about 74,863 a year earlier.
